title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course that covers artificial intelligence fundamentals. The video series features instruction by Brian Yu on AI topics including game-playing algorithms. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This CS50 video, part of Harvard University's introductory computer science course, opens an Introduction to Artificial Intelligence series taught by Brian Yu. Chapter 1 focuses on game-playing algorithms, situating them within broader AI engineering fundamentals. The course is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
